endpoints.name: GET /v1/assets
endpoints.description: Lists all public, remixable assets. These are assets with an access level of PUBLIC and published under the CC-By license.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Returns detailed information about an asset given its name. PRIVATE assets are returned only if the currently authenticated user (via OAuth token) is the author of the asset.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}/assets
endpoints.description: Lists assets authored by the given user. Only the value 'me', representing the currently-authenticated user, is supported. May include assets with an access level of PRIVATE or UNLISTED and assets which are All Rights Reserved for the currently-authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}/likedassets
endpoints.description: Lists assets that the user has liked. Only the value 'me', representing the currently-authenticated user, is supported. May include assets with an access level of UNLISTED.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
